entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The primary crop being studied for cytoplasmic male sterility and molecular characterization

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: The crop from which heterologous mtDNA probes were derived

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A condition where pollen production is inhibited due to cytoplasmic factors

entities.name: FERTILITY RESTORATION
entities.description: The process or pattern of returning fertility to male-sterile lines

entities.name: RESTRICTION FRAGMENT LENGTH POLYMORPHISM
entities.description: A technique used to assess heterogeneity among male-sterile cytoplasms by analyzing DNA fragment lengths

entities.name: SOUTHERN BLOT HYBRIDIZATION
entities.description: A laboratory method used to detect specific DNA sequences in mitochondrial genomes

entities.name: MITOCHONDRIAL DNA
entities.description: The genetic material located in the mitochondria used for molecular characterization

entities.name: ATP6

entities.description: A specific maize mtDNA clone used as a heterologous probe

entities.description: A specific genetic group of pearl millet lines characterized for mitochondrial variation

entities.description: A specific genetic group of pearl millet lines characterized for mitochondrial variation
